Open source projects in this category

GrapesJS

Open source drag-and-drop visual builder framework.

License: BSD-3-Clause Self-host: ★★☆☆☆

Silex

Free and open source website builder in the browser.

License: AGPL-3.0 Self-host: ★★☆☆☆

WordPress (self-hosted)

The world's most used open source CMS.

License: GPL-2.0 Self-host: ★★☆☆☆

Ghost (self-hosted)

Modern open source publishing platform with paid newsletters.

License: MIT Self-host: ★★☆☆☆

Hugo

Blazing-fast static site generator in Go.

License: Apache-2.0 Self-host: ★☆☆☆☆
